articles.title: How Roku fits into Fox's future — and what investors are missing about the deal
articles.summary: Fox's stock dropped following its announcement that it will acquire Roku for $22 billion. Analysts still think it's a good deal.

articles.title: Rivian laying off hundreds of workers amid R2 launch
articles.summary: Rivian said Tuesday it was laying off hundreds of workers, or less than 2% of its workforce.

articles.title: General Motors announces new defense partnership with Lockheed Martin
articles.summary: General Motors announced a new defense partnership with Lockheed Martin as the country ramps up its production of weapons.

articles.title: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market

articles.summary: The NBA plans to begin naming winning bidders for 12 permanent European teams in the next 60 to 90 days, Deputy Commissioner Mark Tatum told CNBC.

articles.summary: The IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic could create a tax windfall for the state of California. But experts say the revenue impact may be blunted.

articles.summary: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.

articles.summary: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.

articles.title: UPS to invest $48 million in temperature-controlled facilities amid healthcare boom
articles.summary: UPS is announcing a new investment in healthcare logistics as demand for the temperature-controlled category booms, CNBC has learned exclusively.

articles.title: Emerytura do 500 zł. Niepokojące informacje z ZUS
articles.summary: Po tegorocznej waloryzacji wzrosła liczba osób pobierających bardzo niskie świadczenia emerytalne. 30,1 tys. osób pobierało emerytury do 500 zł, o 8,7 proc. więcej niż rok wcześniej - poinformował ZUS w analizie rozkładu wypłaty świadczeń po marcowej waloryzacji.

articles.title: ZUS wysłał blisko 9 mln listów do emerytów. Dwie decyzje w jednej kopercie
articles.summary: Do emerytów i rencistów trafiło blisko 8,9 mln pakietów dokumentów dot. waloryzacji świadczeń oraz dodatkowego rocznego świadczenia pieniężnego, tzw. trzynastej emerytury - poinformował Zakład Ubezpieczeń Społecznych.

articles.title: Centene to offer buyouts to some employees as health insurer cuts costs
articles.summary: The health insurer Centene did not indicate to how many employees were offered buyouts or how much it is aiming to reduce its workforce.

articles.title: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback
articles.summary: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.
